title: myrcia neoregeliana
intro: Myrcia neoregeliana, also known as Neoregelia, is a genus of flowering plants in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly referred to as air plants or tillandsia. The Neoregelia has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential candidate for the development of new antimicrobial agents. The health benefits of Neoregelia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Neoregelia typically involve the leaves being extracted in a solvent, such as ethanol or water, to create a liquid or dried powder that can be used in traditional medicine.
